insight: Let the gap teach before you close it
plainSummary: The distance from what we seek can teach patience, presence, clear seeing, or love, depending on how we meet it.
atAGlance: What stands between us and what we seek is not always only an obstacle. Some paths let distance teach patience and trust. Some paths cut delay by asking us to live the truth now. Longing can keep love alive, but distance should never excuse needless suffering.
